summary: Record follow-up hygiene found while adding the Git/ZIP goal worktree preflight guard.

observations.problem: After adding a public schema, regenerating report schema samples changed source-tree fingerprints and left ops/script-output-surfaces.json stale until it was refreshed again.
observations.why_it_matters: A developer can run the right fixture regeneration and still hit make test failures later if script-output-surfaces is refreshed before the final source-fingerprinted fixture changes.
observations.automation_candidate: Teach report-schema sample regeneration or report-contract closeout to refresh script-output-surfaces after frozen fixture changes, or have the check emit the exact follow-up target when only the source-tree fingerprint differs.
observations.suggested_followup: Automated by routing schema/sample/test fingerprint changes through report-contract-closeout, whose precheck policy refreshes script-output-surfaces before generated index, readiness, artifact freshness, and report-contract evidence.
